symptoms: After moving TMPDIR to /root, NeMo successfully advanced past tokenizer restoration and failed during model instantiation.
Torch attempted CUDA initialization and raised a runtime error that the installed NVIDIA driver is too old.
The host still lacks a usable GPU runtime even though the checkpoint can proceed further with CPU-compatible extraction.

evidence.details: VALIDATE_LOAD_RETRY_1 traceback shows RuntimeError: The NVIDIA driver on your system is too old during torch.cuda._lazy_init().
gpu check had already recorded that GPU runtime is unavailable on this host.

recommended_action: Retry VALIDATE_LOAD with CPU fallback by masking CUDA visibility while keeping TMPDIR on the root-backed temporary directory.
